sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104729" key="triainw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρῐαινώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n104729.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">τριαινοειδής</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">An.Ox.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.447</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
